title: Create: Sound of Steam: Better Console
description: Retextures the keyboard relay from Sound of Steam to look like an actual organ.
body: Makes the keyboard relay bigger and better. That's about it.![a picture of the new keyboard in the wild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd1176041019715bd3e47d40854e7a6e8e970e99.png)
